title: Quick Right Click Options
description: Adds Quick Right Click Options to various screens, allowing you to navigate menus easier with configurable context menus!
body:
![image of context menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24954e23b9fb9251480eed9288818b7bd69cbb4c.png)


[![Join our Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1291083892752646144?color=7289da&label=discord&logo=discord&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d)
[![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Buy%20me%20a%20coffee-Ko--fi-FF5E5B?logo=kofi&style=for-the-badge)](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys)
[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Source_Code-181717?logo=github&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/michiel1106/better-world-options-template-1.21.3)



## Features:
- Title screen context menu
- Singleplayer screen context menu
- Multiplayer screen context menu
- Create world screen context menu
- Right click servers to edit, join or delete them!
- Right click singleplayer worlds to rename their folder, delete, join, recreate or edit them!
- Toggleable animation
- Configure on which screen the context menu's open!
- **Configure the border color!**

### Check the gallery for all the context menus!  
\
Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous!
